'''kazuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyelogram|pyelogram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyelogram|pyelogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kazuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæzizhith|kæzizhith]] || [[word:kæzizhij|kæzizhij]] || [[word:kæzizhish|kæzizhish]] || [[word:kæzizhi|kæzizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazuzuzhuth|kazuzuzhuth]] || [[word:kazuzuzhuj|kazuzuzhuj]] || [[word:kazuzuzhush|kazuzuzhush]] || [[word:kazuzuzhu|kazuzuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazuzhuth|kazuzhuth]] || [[word:kazuzhuj|kazuzhuj]] || [[word:kazuzhush|kazuzhush]] || [[word:kazuzhu|kazuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazufzhuth|kazufzhuth]] || [[word:kazufzhuj|kazufzhuj]] || [[word:kazufzhush|kazufzhush]] || [[word:kazufzhuf|kazufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kazuzhuthu|kazuzhuthu]] || [[word:kazuzhuju|kazuzhuju]] || [[word:kazuzhushu|kazuzhushu]] || [[word:kazuzhuku|kazuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kazuzhuth|kazuzhuth]] || [[word:kazuzhuj|kazuzhuj]] || [[word:kazuzhush|kazuzhush]] || [[word:kazuzhu|kazuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kazuzhuthul|kazuzhuthul]] || [[word:kazuzhujul|kazuzhujul]] || [[word:kazuzhushul|kazuzhushul]] || [[word:kazuzhukul|kazuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kazuzhuthuthu|kazuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:kazuzhujuju|kazuzhujuju]] || [[word:kazuzhushushu|kazuzhushushu]] || [[word:kazuzhuku|kazuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kazuzhuthun|kazuzhuthun]] || [[word:kazuzhujun|kazuzhujun]] || [[word:kazuzhushun|kazuzhushun]] || [[word:kazuzhukun|kazuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kazuzhuthuoro|kazuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:kazuzhujuoro|kazuzhujuoro]] || [[word:kazuzhushuoro|kazuzhushuoro]] || [[word:kazuzhukuoro|kazuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
